name: Multi-Agent Trust Verifier
description: Verifies trust between agents by checking goal alignment, spend limits, action scope, and detecting goal drift. Covers OWASP ASI01 Agent Goal Hijack. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: verify_agent_trust
tools.description: Verifies trust between agents by checking goal alignment, spend limits, action scope, and detecting goal drift. Returns trust score and approve/deny/escalate recommendation.

requestingAgentId.description: ID of the agent requesting the action

targetAgentId.description: ID of the agent that will execute the action

originalGoal.description: The original goal or task the agent was assigned

proposedSpend.description: Proposed spend for this action in USD
